title: Cheering at a Game 比赛加油
scene: Kate和Dan在看台上为校队加油助威。

lines.en: Dan, the game is about to start!
I know! I am so excited. Go, Team Blue!
lines.zh: 我知道！我好激动。蓝队加油！

lines.en: Look, our school is running with the ball!
lines.zh: 看，我们学校的人带着球在跑！

lines.en: Run, run! You can do it!
Oh no, the other team got the ball.
It is OK. Our defense is strong.
lines.zh: 没关系。我们的防守很强。

lines.en: Yes! He passed it to Jack!
That was amazing! Let us cheer louder!
lines.zh: 太精彩了！我们大声加油！

lines.en: We are winning! This is the best game ever!
lines.zh: 我们要赢了！这是最棒的一场比赛！
